findings.description: All four image alt texts use the generic word 'icon', which is listed as a generic placeholder term. While they include a brief descriptor (e.g., 'Microphone mute'), appending 'icon' keeps them in generic territory.
findings.evidence: HTML alt texts: 'Microphone mute icon', 'Chat bubble icon', 'Share screen icon', 'Red X exit icon'. Guidance flags 'icon' as generic placeholder alt text.
